_meta.title: Extra labelled text cases for the eval harness
_meta.note: Raw-text reports (not in the bundled sample set) with known-correct verdicts, used to broaden evaluation coverage beyond the demo samples.

cases.title: Lead from old plumbing
cases.text:
Water Test

TDS 410 mg/L
Lead 0.05 mg/L
Iron 0.2 mg/L
